title: Essential Smelting
description: Adds smelting recipe that mojang either forgot or didn't wanna add
body:
This mod/DP adds a few smelt recipes that mojang never added but makes sense to be add

to intall this as a mod:
1. install the mod
2. add the mod JAR file in "mods" folder for any supported mod loaders
3. launch the game

to install this as a datapack:
1. install the datapack ZIP file
2. put the ZIP file in the "datapack" folder in the world you want to add it to
3. launch that world
